name: Parkour Master
short_description: Master precise jumps and timing as you parkour your way through 10 levels filled with challenging obstacles and unique platform types.
detailed_description: "Parkour Master" is a challenging first-person parkour game. It has a total of 10 levels, each more challenging than the previous one. It slowly introduces the different types of platforms, each having its own special effect. All special platforms with their descriptions can be found in the "How to Play" section.
about_the_game: "Parkour Master" is a challenging first-person parkour game. It has a total of 10 levels, each more challenging than the previous one. It slowly introduces the different types of platforms, each having its own special effect. All special platforms with their descriptions can be found in the "How to Play" section.
supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
